videoSnippet.title: It's Either Winning or It's Not || Awonder vs Hikaru || Training Match 2026
videoSnippet.description:

Liang, Awonder (2719) - Nakamura, Hikaru (2810)
Nakamura - Liang Training Match (Chess.com) [02] 2026.03.13
B67 Sicilian, Richter-Rauzer, Rauzer attack, 7...a6 defence, 8...Bd7

1.e4 c5 2.Nf3 d6 3.d4 cxd4 4.Nxd4 Nf6 5.Nc3 Nc6 6.Bg5 e6 7.Qd2 a6 8.O-O-O Bd7 9.Kb1 Nxd4 10.Qxd4 Be7 11.h4 Qc7 12.Be2 b5 13.f4 Bc6 14.Bxf6 gxf6 15.Bh5 Qa7 16.Qd3 Qc5 17.g4 Rc8 18.Ne2 Qc4 19.Nd4 Qxd3 20.cxd3 Bd7 21.g5 Bd8 22.Nc2 Ke7 23.Ne3 fxg5 24.fxg5 h6 25.Ng4 hxg5 26.hxg5 Bb6 27.Nf6 Be3 28.Nxd7 Kxd7 29.Bxf7 Bxg5 30.Rhg1 Rcf8 31.Bxe6+ Kxe6 32.Rxg5 Rf2 33.Rg6+ Ke7 34.Rg7+ Ke6 35.Rg6+ Ke7 36.Rg7+ Ke6 37.Rg6+ Ke5
